evals.prompt: This skill has no shareable-skills metadata and I want to symlink it globally. Walk me through whether it should be shareable or repo-local.
evals.expected_output: A guided shareability decision that asks the missing questions, chooses a visibility, and recommends the minimal metadata update.
assertions: The response asks at least one portability question before deciding
The response chooses either shareable or repo-local

evals.prompt: This skill is useful, but one section depends on a repo-only script. Decide whether to split it or keep it repo-local.
evals.expected_output: A recommendation that weighs splitting against keeping the skill repo-local and records the resulting metadata path.
assertions: The response considers splitting the skill
The response does not recommend a shareable skill with hidden repo-only dependencies
The response keeps hard dependency tracking explicit
